## Checklist

- [ ] `make all` passes (fmt-check, vet, test, build)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] If an API call was added/changed: verified against the pinned spec and
      updated `pkg/core/contract_test.go`
- [ ] Updated docs (README / `docs/`) where relevant
- [ ] Preserved the agent contract (data on stdout, diagnostics on stderr,
      stable exit codes)
